buildCommand: cd documentation && bun install --frozen-lockfile && bun run build

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: https://api.dicebear.com; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' https:; form-action 'self' https:; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'
